description_long: This is a robust, rectangular storage box with a deep brown color and a solid, industrial appearance. The box features a recessed top area, likely for stacking or securing a lid, and horizontal slats or grooves on its sides for structural reinforcement. One side displays a blurred label with Japanese katakana characters, suggesting it may be used for specific categorized storage or waste collection in urban environments. Another side has a white duck-shaped marking, possibly for identification or decorative purposes, while a third side shows small icons, hinting at recycling or sorting functions. The box appears to be made primarily of molded plastic, with a smooth, hard surface and no visible handles or external locking mechanisms. Its size and design indicate it is suitable for placement on the ground in public or semi-public spaces such as sidewalks, parks, or garages.
description: A sturdy, brown rectangular storage box with horizontal grooves, a recessed top, and distinct markings including a label and a duck icon. Made of hard plastic, it is designed for urban ground placement and likely used for categorized storage or waste.
description_view_0: Front view shows a blurred Japanese label and two prominent horizontal slats.
description_view_1: This side view features a plain surface with subtle grooves and small icons near the bottom corner.
description_view_2: Opposite side to the front, this view is unmarked except for the horizontal grooves.
description_view_3: This side displays a white duck-shaped marking on the lower panel.
